caption: The video shows a crowd of people, including several men in khaki police uniforms and others in civilian clothing, gathered outdoors. The scenes are framed by news broadcast graphics with red backgrounds and white and yellow text. A ticker at the top reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी है" and a banner at the bottom states "JDU कोटे से मंत्री बने विजय चौधरी". Small portrait photos of politicians are displayed on the sides, labeled with titles like "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "डिप्टी CM", and "मंत्री", along with names such as "संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार". As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, focusing on a man in a brown jacket speaking amidst the group. In the later frames, a person's hand enters the foreground, pointing towards the group. A timestamp of "10:03 PM" remains constant at the bottom right of each scene.
